hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"NKS r149 — orient before coding. Run nks_orient realm r149; then open your agenda: nks_orient realm r149 focus 6 (agent karta 6 = Khranitel konnektora; focus holon 5). Incoming posed_to vimarshas are your inbox — pick up or explicitly defer each. The entry skill runs the protocol."}}'

grep -Eq 'projects[\\/].*memory[\\/]' && { echo 'BLOCKED: local agent memory is forbidden for project state (see AGENTS.md, Persistence rules). Route the fact to AGENTS.md (repo conventions, code/git facts) or a hint vimarsha in realm r149 (graph). This dir stays frozen at its prohibition stub.' >&2; exit 2; } || exit 0

grep -q 'git push' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"git push — update NKS r149: match reality (architecture/API/UX changes, not lockfile/refactor churn), advance the bianhua map and close resolved vimarshas, sweep the shipped contour (flip modes of realized designed nodes), sweep the inbox (visarjana answered posed_to), then run the after-green-push self-review. Uningested design/spec docs on this branch — intake them first."}}' || true

grep -Eq '[\\/]specs[\\/][^"]*\.md|[\\/]docs[\\/][^"]*design[^"]*\.md' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"A design draft was written; per AGENTS.md this file is a draft view — the graph (realm r149) is the design record. Intake it (intake skill, then design skill) in this session — do not defer to a push."}}' || true
